title: 追憶の先のプリンシプル

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I get an idea to address Biwa
Hayahide's anxiety by setting up a scrimmage
between her and Winning Ticket.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide loses, but her loss facilitates a
major breakthrough. She realizes she started
creating her equation because of a desire not to
lose to her sister, Narita Brian.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Success, though, isn't just about not losing. It's about winning. So we resolve to create a real winning equation from scratch... hopefully in time for the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket and Narita Taishin give their full
support.
